name: zoho-desk
description: Cognigy extension for Zoho Desk ticket workflows and article Knowledge imports.

scripts.zip: tar cfz zoho-desk.tar.gz build/* package.json package-lock.json README.md icon.png
scripts.zip:source: rm -f zoho-desk-source-v${npm_package_version}.zip && zip -r zoho-desk-source-v${npm_package_version}.zip README.md DEVELOPMENT.md icon.png package.json package-lock.json scripts src tsconfig.json tslint.json
scripts.build: npm run transpile && npm run lint && npm run smoke && npm run zip

author: PAteam
